title: oncocalyx glabratus
intro: Oncocalyx glabratus is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oncocalyx glabratus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
